iree_add_all_subdirs()

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    main
  HDRS
    "main.h"
  SRCS
    "main.c"
  DEPS
    iree::base
    iree::base::tooling::flags
    iree::io::file_handle
    loom::src::loom::ops::op_registry
    loom::src::loom::target::provider
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::hal::artifact
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::hal::testbench_actual
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::session
    loom::src::loom::tooling::io::file
    loom::src::loom::tooling::testbench::executor
    loom::src::loom::tooling::testbench::reference
    loom::src::loom::tooling::testbench::requirements
    loom::src::loom::util::json
    loom::src::loom::util::stream
  PUBLIC
)

loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    iree-test-loom
  SRCS
    "iree-test-loom.c"
  COPTS

  DEPS
    ::main
    iree::base
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::execution_provider
)

iree_lit_test_suite(
  NAME
    lit_test
  SRCS
    "iree-test-loom_test.txt"
  TOOLS
    ::iree-test-loom
    FileCheck
  DATA
    testdata::scalar_cases.loom
  LABELS
    "hostonly"
)

iree_lit_test_suite(
  NAME
    amdgpu_lit_test
  SRCS
    "iree-test-loom_amdgpu_test.txt"
  TOOLS
    ::iree-test-loom
    FileCheck
  DATA
    testdata::amdgpu_hal_actual.loom
  LABELS
    "driver=amdgpu"
    "manual"
    "requires-gpu-amd"
)

iree_lit_test_suite(
  NAME
    spirv_vulkan_lit_test
  SRCS
    "iree-test-loom_spirv_vulkan_test.txt"
  TOOLS
    ::iree-test-loom
    FileCheck
  DATA
    testdata::spirv_vulkan_coop_hal_actual.loom
    testdata::spirv_vulkan_hal_actual.loom
  LABELS
    "driver=vulkan"
    "manual"
    "requires-gpu-vulkan"
)

### BAZEL_TO_CMAKE_PRESERVES_ALL_CONTENT_BELOW_THIS_LINE ###

option(IREE_TEST_LOOM_ENABLE_AMDGPU
  "Link the AMDGPU HAL execution provider into iree-test-loom." ON)
option(IREE_TEST_LOOM_ENABLE_IREEVM
  "Link the IREEVM execution provider into iree-test-loom." ON)
option(IREE_TEST_LOOM_ENABLE_SPIRV
  "Link the SPIR-V Vulkan HAL execution provider into iree-test-loom." ON)

iree_package_name(_IREE_TEST_LOOM_PACKAGE_NAME)
set(_IREE_TEST_LOOM_TARGET "${_IREE_TEST_LOOM_PACKAGE_NAME}_iree-test-loom")

function(_iree_test_loom_enable_provider _target _definition _library)
  target_compile_definitions(${_target} PRIVATE
    ${_definition}=1
  )
  target_link_libraries(${_target} PRIVATE
    ${_library}
  )
endfunction()

if(IREE_TEST_LOOM_ENABLE_AMDGPU)
  _iree_test_loom_enable_provider(
    ${_IREE_TEST_LOOM_TARGET}
    IREE_TEST_LOOM_HAVE_AMDGPU
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::hal::amdgpu::provider
  )
endif()

if(IREE_TEST_LOOM_ENABLE_IREEVM)
  _iree_test_loom_enable_provider(
    ${_IREE_TEST_LOOM_TARGET}
    IREE_TEST_LOOM_HAVE_IREEVM
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::ireevm::provider
  )
endif()

if(IREE_TEST_LOOM_ENABLE_SPIRV)
  _iree_test_loom_enable_provider(
    ${_IREE_TEST_LOOM_TARGET}
    IREE_TEST_LOOM_HAVE_SPIRV
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::hal::spirv::provider
  )
  target_link_libraries(${_IREE_TEST_LOOM_TARGET} PRIVATE
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::hal::spirv::testbench_requirements
  )
endif()

unset(_IREE_TEST_LOOM_TARGET)
unset(_IREE_TEST_LOOM_PACKAGE_NAME)
